title: META Quest 3S Mixed Reality Headset - 128 GB
subtitle: META Quest 3S Mixed
overview: Dive into amazing experiences with the Meta Quest 3S. It uses 2 RGB cameras to enhance the world around you with virtual objects and scenes. Put a massive movie screen on your living room wall, play digital board games on your coffee table, or extend your laptop with virtual screens. With 4.5 times better resolution than the Quest 2, you can savour every little detail. And for fully immersive VR gaming, there's the Qualcomm Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 chipset. It's packed with power to make the visuals sharper and loading times faster.  Good to know  - The Touch Plus Controllers precisely track your hands whether you're moving a cursor or a lightsabre - TruTouch haptic feedback in the controllers lets you feel the objects you interact with - A single charge gives you up to 2.5 hours of gaming – plenty to beat a few bosses - The displays run at a 90 Hz refresh rate and cover 96 degrees of your field of view for amazing immersion - Its lightweight design and soft head strap will keep you comfy
key_features: Qualcomm Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 chipset for seamless performa ...
Backwards compatible with Meta Quest catalogue

title: META Quest 3 Mixed Reality Headset - 512 GB
subtitle: META Quest 3 Mixed
overview: Put on the Meta Quest 3 and watch the world around you grow. It's got 2 RGB cameras that let you see the room you're in and fill it with apps, games and experiences. You can play digital board games on your coffee table or slay monsters coming at you from a virtual hole in your wall. All nice and ultra-realistic, curtesy of the 4K+ Infinite Display. It fills your field of view, so you can forget about the real world and get lost in the virtual one. That takes some serious processing power. Like the Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor, with twice the GPU power of the Quest 2. You can interact with the digital world using the Quest Touch Plus Controllers for maximum accuracy. Or go with the more natural feel of Direct Touch hand tracking and use gestures to tap, scroll and navigate. And of course, there are no computers, wires, or distractions. Just you and the reality you choose.   Good to know    - It's not just the visuals – the integrated speakers envelop you in 3D spatial audio - TruTouc

title: PLAYSTATION VR2 Gaming Headset
subtitle: PLAYSTATION VR2 Gaming Headset
overview: Gaming just got real. With graphics powered by your PS5, the VR2 headset pulls you into a different world. It uses two 4K OLED displays to fill your field of view with sharp, vibrant images. And they run at up to 120 Hz refresh rate for super smooth and realistic motion. That's sharp and smooth enough to make you forget about the outside world. But, to draw you even further in, there's Tempest 3D audio that'll put planes over your head and creepers behind your back. And the included VR2 Sense controllers have the excellent haptic feedback you're used to from your PS5's controllers. Put it all together and it'll look, sound and feel like you're in the game.   Good to know    - A single USB Type-C cable is all you need – plug it into your PS5 and you're off to the races - To get the best experience, you can adjust the lenses, headband and scope to fit your eyes and head perfectly - With cameras built-in to the headset and controller tracking, there's no need for any external trackers - N
key_features: Full virtual reality experience at home
110° field of view for captivating immersion

title: PICO 4 Ultra VR Gaming Headset - 256 GB
subtitle: PICO 4 Ultra VR
overview: The Pico 4 Ultra takes reality up a notch. It's a mixed reality headset, so it blends the real and the virtual worlds together. You can put a massive movie screen in your living room or extend your laptop with virtual screens. Just like in sci-fi movies. It's got dual 32 MP cameras for a clear image of the world around you. And the precise environmental tracking makes sure that virtual objects stay where you put them. It's all powered by the Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor with plenty of power for all your favourite games. And thanks to the 4K+ Binocular Vision Display, you can enjoy every little detail.  Good to know  - The new controllers have precise tracking and a comfy grip for long gaming sessions - You can take spatial videos and photos and re-live your memories like never before  - The 5700 mAh battery sits on the back and acts as a counterweight for a more balanced feel - You can mirror the screen of your Mac, Windows, iOS or Android device - PanoScreen Workspace lets you open
key_features: Blends the real world with virtual reality
Advanced Qualcomm Snapdragon XR2 Gen 2 processor

title: PLAYSTATION PS5 DualSense Wireless Controller with USB Type-C Cable - Midnight Black
subtitle: PLAYSTATION PS5 DualSense Wireless
overview: Bring your PC games to life with the PS5 DualSense wireless controller. The Haptic feedback lets you feel every hit, knock and tiny detail like it's happening right in your hands. Adaptive triggers add that extra bit of tension, changing with whatever's going on in the game. And with quick Bluetooth pairing or USB Type-C, you can hop between your PC, console or phone without breaking your flow.  Good to know  - Steam support gets you into 10,000+ PC games straight away - Its multi-device memory keeps four Bluetooth connections ready to switch - Remote Play streams your PS5 or PS4 games straight to your PC - Its textured controls improve grip and precision during fast in-game moments - The rechargeable battery gives you hours of wireless gameplay - Firmware updates install directly through the PlayStation Accessories PC app

subtitle: FITBIT Charge 6 Fitness
overview: Get your fitness journey back on track with the Fitbit Charge 6. It has a whopping 7 days of battery life so you can track an entire weeks' worth of data without running out of juice. Even when you're asleep, your Fitbit is monitoring your heart rate, blood oxygen, skin temperature and more, for a well-rounded overview of your health. With a daily sleep score, you'll be able to tell how soundly your slept which means you can improve your health from all angles. title: JLAB Go Party Portable Bluetooth Speaker - Black
subtitle: JLAB Go Party Portable
overview: Turn up the fun with this JLab Go Party speaker. This compact 10 W speaker's dual drivers and passive woofers give you clear highs and punchy bass. With the JLab app, you can choose from Signature, Balance or Bass Boost EQ presets and set the RGB party lights to match your mood. The batterylasts up to 16 hours (or around 8 with lights), so the music keeps going well into the night. And when you want to go big, LabSync lets you link up to 100 speakers, so every room joins in on the party.  Good to know  - Stereo pairing lets you split sound left and right for an immersive feel - IP56 water resistance means a bit of rain won't stop the music - The loop handle makes the speaker easy to carry wherever you go
